case_title: LESCALLETT, ESTRELLA et al VS CORDOVA, OSCAR ESPARZA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY LESCALLETT, ESTRELLA OGUNJIMI, OLU-PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CORDOVA, OSCAR ESPARZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORDOVA, OSCAR ESPARZA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OGUNJIMI, OLU-PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORDOVA, OSCAR ESPARZA $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,190.00, CLAIM BY PLTF ESTRELLA LESCOLLETT ORDERED DISMIS- SED AS SHE DID NOT OWN THE VEHICLE DAMAGED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
